title: lepidium paysonii
intro: Lepidium paysonii, also known as Payson's peppercress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Lepidium paysonii include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Lepidium paysonii can be prepared as an herbal supplement, tea, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
